primary_angle.title: The only wrist adapter engineered for 40.35mm
primary_angle.core_message: Cradle Adapter V1 is the precision-engineered solution for Royal Pop wrist conversion, designed to fit the exact 40.35mm case with a 0.7mm retaining lip and 22mm lug width. No guesswork, no generic straps—just an exact fit.
primary_angle.why_this_wins: Addresses the audience's top tension (fear of poor fit) by leading with exact specs, which competitors are also highlighting but without the same level of engineering detail. Leverages the cultural momentum of 'Project WristPop' while positioning Pop Wrist Studio as the definitive solution.
primary_angle.audience: Royal Pop owners and prospective buyers who prioritize precision, engineering, and premium design in their accessories.
primary_angle.desired_reaction: Audience should feel confidence in the adapter's fit and quality, and urgency to join the waitlist before competitors flood the market with inferior solutions.

supporting_angle.title: Five colourways, one exact fit
supporting_angle.purpose: Highlight the product variations (colourways) while reinforcing the engineering-first approach. Addresses the tension around material quality and durability by showcasing the FKM rubber material across all colour options. Also resolves the calendar focus conflict (Product variations) by tying it to the primary angle.

content_decision.goal: Showcase the precision engineering of the Cradle Adapter V1 while demonstrating its versatility across all five colourways. Drive waitlist sign-ups by emphasizing exact fit and premium material.
content_decision.hook_direction: Engineering-first transformation: Start with the Royal Pop in pocket format, then show the exact measurements (40.35mm, 0.7mm lip, 22mm lug width) before revealing the wrist conversion with the adapter in each colourway.
content_decision.conversion_role: Use the Reel to build trust in the adapter's fit and quality, then direct viewers to the waitlist with a clear CTA ('Pre-Order Now').

creative_direction.tone: Premium, direct, and slightly obsessive about fit and finish. Avoid hype or generic luxury language.
creative_direction.pace: Calm and confident, with a focus on precision. Use slow zooms on the adapter's engineering details (e.g., retaining lip, crown notches).
creative_direction.visual_energy: High contrast between the Royal Pop's design and the adapter's functionality. Use close-ups to emphasize the exact fit and material quality.
must_show: Adapter's 0.7mm retaining lip and 22mm lug width
Cradle Adapter V1 in all five colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso)
must_not_do: Use competitor names or direct comparisons
Overpromise on availability or delivery timelines
Assume audience familiarity with FKM rubber without a brief explanation

success_metric.secondary: Engagement rate (likes, comments, shares) on the Reel, with a focus on comments asking about fit, colour options, or pre-order details.

brief_for_copy.script_goal: Highlight the precision engineering of the Cradle Adapter V1 while showcasing its versatility across all five colourways. Emphasize exact fit (40.35mm, 0.7mm lip, 22mm lug width) and material quality (FKM rubber). End with a clear CTA to join the waitlist.
brief_for_copy.caption_goal: Reinforce the adapter's exact fit and premium material while teasing the five colour options. Use concise, design-literate language to appeal to watch enthusiasts and collectors. Include the waitlist CTA and a brief explanation of FKM rubber for durability.
brief_for_copy.cta_language: Pre-Order Now — join the waitlist to secure your Cradle Adapter V1 before the first batch sells out.
proof_points_to_include: Exact fit for 40.35mm Royal Pop case
FKM rubber for durability and premium feel
Five colourways: Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
